---
title: "GSE164378 c=1 Spectrum Fit"
output: html_document
---

This report isolates the potentially troublesome square case with exactly
2,000 genes and 2,000 cells. It uses the package GSE164378 3' CITE-seq RNA
example, keeps all 2,000 HVGs, samples 2,000 cells, applies the package default
log-normalized centered preprocessing, and fits the Gaussian spike / MP bulk.

```{r setup}
library(scScale)
data(gse164378_3p_citeseq_hvg)

counts_full <- gse164378_3p_citeseq_hvg$rna_counts
stopifnot(nrow(counts_full) == 2000)

set.seed(164378)
cells <- sample(colnames(counts_full), 2000)
counts <- counts_full[, cells, drop = FALSE]

dim(counts)
```

## Fit

```{r fit}
fit <- scscale_fit(
  counts,
  r = 30,
  fit_umi = FALSE,
  mp_max_iter = 30,
  mp_grid_n = 5000,
  store_matrix = TRUE
)

summary_table <- data.frame(
  p = fit$p,
  n = fit$n,
  c_X = fit$c_X,
  normalization = fit$normalization$method,
  target_depth = fit$normalization$target_depth,
  center = fit$normalization$center,
  scale = fit$normalization$scale,
  selected_iteration = fit$bulk$selected_iteration,
  stop_reason = fit$bulk$stop_reason,
  tau2 = fit$bulk$tau2,
  lambda_plus = fit$bulk$lambda_plus,
  n_bulk = length(fit$bulk$bulk_index),
  n_spikes = length(fit$bulk$spike_index)
)

summary_table
fit$bulk$history[, c(
  "iteration", "n_bulk", "n_spikes", "tau2", "lambda_plus",
  "qq_rmse_log", "ks", "neg_log_likelihood", "support_fraction",
  "stop_metric_value"
)]
```

## Top Eigenvalues

```{r top-eigenvalues}
head(
  fit$spikes[, c(
    "rank", "lambda", "lambda_tilde", "is_spike", "d2_X", "q_X",
    "lambda_plus"
  )],
  30
)
```

## Spectrum Fit

```{r spectrum-plots, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
lambda <- fit$spectrum$lambda
bulk <- fit$bulk
bulk_lambda <- lambda[bulk$bulk_index]
bulk_lambda <- bulk_lambda[is.finite(bulk_lambda) & bulk_lambda > 0]
spike_lambda <- lambda[bulk$spike_index]

mp_density <- getFromNamespace("scscale_mp_density", "scScale")
mp_quantile <- getFromNamespace("scscale_mp_quantile", "scScale")

mp_x <- seq(max(bulk$mp_lower, 0), bulk$lambda_plus, length.out = 800)
mp_y <- mp_density(mp_x, c_X = fit$c_X, tau2 = bulk$tau2)

old_par <- par(mfrow = c(2, 2), mar = c(4.2, 4.4, 2.6, 1))

hist(
  bulk_lambda,
  breaks = 70,
  freq = FALSE,
  col = "grey85",
  border = "white",
  xlab = expression(lambda),
  main = "Bulk eigenvalues"
)
lines(mp_x, mp_y, col = "#D55E00", lwd = 2)
abline(v = bulk$lambda_plus, col = "#D55E00", lty = 2)
rug(spike_lambda, col = "#0072B2", lwd = 2)
legend(
  "topright",
  legend = c("MP density", expression(lambda["+"]), "spikes"),
  col = c("#D55E00", "#D55E00", "#0072B2"),
  lwd = c(2, 1, 2),
  lty = c(1, 2, 1),
  bty = "n"
)

hist(
  log10(bulk_lambda),
  breaks = 70,
  freq = FALSE,
  col = "grey85",
  border = "white",
  xlab = expression(log[10](lambda)),
  main = "Log bulk eigenvalues"
)
abline(v = log10(bulk$lambda_plus), col = "#D55E00", lty = 2)

emp_q <- sort(bulk_lambda)
theory_q <- vapply(
  ppoints(length(emp_q)),
  mp_quantile,
  numeric(1),
  c_X = fit$c_X,
  tau2 = bulk$tau2,
  grid_n = 5000
)
plot(
  theory_q,
  emp_q,
  pch = 16,
  cex = 0.45,
  col = "#0072B2",
  xlab = "MP theoretical quantile",
  ylab = "Empirical bulk quantile",
  main = "Bulk QQ"
)
abline(0, 1, col = "#D55E00", lwd = 2)

plot(
  fit$bulk$history$iteration,
  fit$bulk$history$qq_rmse_log,
  type = "b",
  pch = 16,
  col = "#0072B2",
  xlab = "Iteration",
  ylab = "QQ RMSE, log scale",
  main = "Bulk goodness across iterations"
)
abline(v = fit$bulk$selected_iteration, col = "#D55E00", lty = 2)

par(old_par)
```
